issues.description: Counter effects trigger on 'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'. This is a Counter card that should respond to an attack.
First effect missing conditional check for opponent's Life cards (condition should evaluate 'if your opponent has 2 or less Life cards' before applying the second +2000 power boost).
Second action is completely wrong: KO of opponent character is not mentioned in card text. This effect should be a conditional PowerBoost (+2000 additional) when opponent has ≤2 Life, not a KO.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' (or equivalent battle-specific duration), not 'EndOfBattle'. The power boost applies 'during this battle', which is a temporary duration.
